business.headline: Parle Industries shares jump 5% after PM Modi gifts Melody to Giorgia MeloniThe rally came after a light-hearted video featuring Modi and Meloni went viral online. In the clip shared on social media, PM Modi was seen gifting a packet of Melody candies to Meloni, seemingly playing on the viral "#Melodi" phrase that internet users often use while referring to the two leaders together.

Banks may soon have to share more details on risks and financial health, says RBIOn Tuesday, the RBI released a draft circular, wherein banks will be required to publish more detailed information on important financial measures such as capital adequacy, leverage, liquidity and risks.

Need PF money fast? EPFO may soon let you withdraw funds through UPILabour Minister Mansukh Mandaviya said on Tuesday that the Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) has completed testing for a facility that would allow members to withdraw their Employees' Provident Fund (EPF) using the UPI payment gateway.

A falling rupee is revealing a bigger crisis of fleeing moneyHandcrafted ByOur Editors The falling rupee needs no support at the moment, and foreign exchange reserves shouldn't be burnt. However, the falling rupee might be pointing to a deeper investment problem. Everything explained here in layman's terms.

Rupee hits record low, inches closer to 97 against US dollarThe rupee fell to a record 96.88 against the US dollar as higher Treasury yields, firm crude and a stronger dollar hit sentiment. The move sharpened concerns around imported inflation, market volatility and pressure on India's import bill.

Sensex, Nifty down: Why is stock market falling today?The BSE Sensex fell 389.19 points, or 0.52%, to 74,811.66 in early trade, while the NSE Nifty50 dropped 107.90 points, or 0.46%, to 23,510.10 as of 9:39 am.

Sensex opens 600 points lower, Nifty below 23,500; Tata Steel falls 2%The BSE Sensex fell 389.19 points, or 0.52%, to 74,811.66 in early trade, while the NSE Nifty50 dropped 107.90 points, or 0.46%, to 23,510.10 as of 9:39 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market rise or fall today?Stock markets are set for a weaker open as rising crude, higher US yields and Iran tensions weigh on sentiment. Persistent foreign selling, elevated volatility and key technical levels are keeping traders cautious.

Wait 5 years for gratuity or take the pay hike? Here's what Indian workers saidYou are just months away from gratuity when a recruiter calls with a tempting pay hike. Do you wait for guaranteed money, or take the career leap? To understand what people really choose, I spoke to Indian professionals across sectors, and the answers were surprisingly divided.

ICICI Bank hikes debit card DCC fee from 1% to 3.5%: What it meansDynamic Currency Conversion, commonly called DCC, allows customers to pay in their home currency instead of the local currency while making international transactions.

3 in 10 loan applications show ITR-bank mismatch: Can you still get a personal loan?Your ITR says one thing, but your bank statement tells a slightly different story — should you worry? As lenders tighten checks and nearly 3 in 10 loan applications show income mismatches, can you still get a personal loan without trouble? Let's find out here.

Why foreign investors are shunning India: Surjit Bhalla points out root causeEven as India's economy faces mounting pressure from rising crude oil prices and disruptions in fertiliser and energy supplies, economist and author Surjit Bhalla has identified a worsening investment climate as the country's biggest challenge.

Sensex, Nifty end lower as banking drag offsets IT rally; rupee hits record lowThe S&P BSE Sensex slipped 114.19 points, or 0.15%, to close at 75,200.85, while the NSE Nifty50 fell 31.95 points, or 0.14%, to settle at 23,618.

Govt likely to receive a big dividend from RBI in FY 27The Reserve Bank of India is expected to approve a record surplus transfer to the government this week. The payout could give the exchequer extra room as higher energy prices add fresh uncertainty.

Want to update Aadhaar for free? UIDAI has extended the deadline againThe UIDAI has announced that Aadhaar holders can continue updating documents linked to their Aadhaar card free of cost through the myAadhaar portal till June 14, 2027. The facility was earlier set to end in June 2026.

Rupee hits record low yet again, nears Rs 97 against US dollarThe rupee slipped to a fresh record low of 96.44 against the US dollar on Tuesday, nearing the Rs 97 mark. Rising crude prices, weak capital inflows and higher US yields are adding to pressure on India's external finances despite RBI intervention.

As milk, fuel and gold get costlier, here are 7 everyday expenses families may cutThe grocery bill feels heavier. Filling the petrol tank costs more. Even an occasional gold purchase suddenly seems expensive. Across India, rising prices are pinching household budgets, leaving many families asking: What everyday expenses can we cut without making life harder? Let's have a look.

Before you file your ITR this year, don't miss these details in AIS and Form 26ASAre you about to file your income tax return without checking AIS and Form 26AS? Before you hit submit, it may be worth taking a closer look, as even small mismatches in income or tax details can create problems later.

Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra shares jump: Why IT stocks gained up to 6% todayMajor IT stocks rebounded sharply on Tuesday, led by Infosys, TCS and midcap peers. The move reflected improving risk appetite, bargain hunting and renewed hopes of stronger US tech spending.

Explained: Why Adani Group stocks rose up to 5% todayAdani Group shares climbed in morning trade after the US moved to drop charges against Gautam Adani and his associates. The move, along with the LPG settlement, eased regulatory uncertainty and lifted investor confidence.

entertainment.headline: War 2 may have failed, but Jr NTR isn't done playing anti-hero. Now enters Dragon Jr NTR is taking a bold step into darker, morally complex characters with his upcoming film Dragon, despite the failure of War 2. The teaser, released in five languages, has created high anticipation ahead of its June 2027 release.

Jr NTR scolds security for mishandling fans in midnight birthday celebration. Video A viral video showed Jr NTR losing his cool at a security staff member during his midnight birthday celebrations in Hyderabad. The clip drew attention online as fans crowded outside his home and the first glimpse of Dragon was unveiled.

Meryl Streep-Martin Short's simple date night is internet's new favourite love story A quiet London dinner outing by Meryl Streep and Martin Short has left the internet emotional over their understated romance. Fans flooded social media with reactions, calling the candid moment "love in its purest form."

Jack Ryan's John Krasinski enters Dhurandhar era, wants to watch Ranveer's film John Krasinski, known for his role as Jack Ryan, praises Indian cinema as some of the most cutting-edge filmmaking and expresses interest in watching Ranveer Singh's film Dhurandhar.

Who is Inder Kaur, Punjabi singer who was found dead in Ludhiana canal? Punjabi singer Inder Kaur was found dead in Ludhiana's Neelo Canal six days after she went missing. Her death has drawn attention to her music career and social media presence.

Trisha wrote 'win' in cryptic post, internet heard CM Vijay Trisha Krishnan's latest Karuppu post and caption have triggered fresh online chatter around Vijay. She posted regular photos from the sets but mentioned a certain "win" in the caption.

Karan Johar's Dharma Productions enters Gujarati cinema with Jindagi Once More Dharma Productions has entered Gujarati cinema with Jindagi Once More, starring Siddharth Randeria. The film brings together established and debut talent for a father-son drama releasing on the Father's Day weekend.

Kheti first look: Jackie Shroff, Sharad Kelkar to headline rural horror drama Actors Jackie Shroff and Sharad Kelkar will headline rural horror film Kheti. The makers unveiled the film's first-look poster on May 20. Here's everything you need to know about the upcoming film.

Sai Tamhankar on her Aamir Khan fangirl era and the Ghajini dream coming true Actor Sai Tamhankar, in an interview, recalled saying yes to Ghajini the moment she heard Aamir Khan's name. She said the film and later work with Paani Foundation showed his discipline and commitment up close.

Amitabh Bachchan not admitted to hospital, went for routine checkup A source said Amitabh Bachchan visited hospital for a routine monthly check-up and returned home. The clarification came after reports claimed he had been admitted for three days over stomach-related issues.

How Parineeta helped Saif Ali Khan bag Priyadarshan's Haiwaan 20 years later Saif Ali Khan revealed that his performance in Parineeta helped him land Priyadarshan's Haiwaan nearly 20 years later. The actor also reflected on Omkara, career insecurity, reinvention and rejecting a film offer involving a suitcase full of cash.

Karuppu box office Day 5: Suriya film stays strong, earns Rs 161 crore globally Suriya and Trisha Krishnan's Karuppu collected Rs 12.75 crore nett in India on Day 5. The film held steady through the opening week, taking its five-day India nett to Rs 95.05 crore. The global collections stand at Rs 161.04.

Salman Khan vs paparazzi outside hospital: Who really crossed the line? Salman Khan clashed with paparazzi outside Mumbai's PD Hinduja Hospital after being followed and pressed for updates on Maatrubhumi. The episode has revived questions about privacy, consent and the eroding limits of celebrity coverage.

Kylie Minogue shares second cancer battle in new Netflix documentary Kylie Minogue has revealed in her new Netflix documentary that she was diagnosed with cancer again in early 2021. She said she chose to share it now to mark that period and remind people about the value of check-ups.

Can CM Vijay's Rajmohan fix a 'bleeding' Kollywood? Tamil industry stands divided Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay's decision to give the Film Technology portfolio to Egmore MLA Rajmohan has split Kollywood, with Vishal criticising the move and Raghava Lawrence backing it. The row reflects wider anxiety over Tamil cinema's financial strain and the demand for quick reform.

Pati Patni Aur Woh Do box office Day 5: Film stays steady but trails predecessor Pati Patni Aur Woh Do earned Rs 3.50 crore on Day 5, taking its India nett to Rs 24.25 crore. The film has held steady despite mixed responses, but it remains behind the 2019 predecessor Pati Patni Aur Woh.

Dragon teaser X reviews: Fans call Jr NTR-Prashanth Neel combo 'insane' The teaser of Dragon starring Jr NTR has sparked massive reactions online after its release on the actor's birthday. Fans especially praised the Jr NTR-Prashanth Neel collaboration, with many calling the combo "insane."

Aditi Rao Hydari serves quiet luxury in cream look at Cannes 2026 Aditi Rao Hydari arrived at Cannes Film Festival 2026 in a cream Club L London midi dress styled by Sanam Ratansi. The actor shared several pictures and videos of the talked-about look on social media.

Salman Khan shares fiery posts after hospital paparazzi row: Enjoying my pain? Salman Khan posted a series of fiery messages after his confrontation with paparazzi outside Mumbai's Hinduja Hospital went viral. The actor criticised the photographers' behaviour and questioned whether they were "enjoying my pain."

general news.headline: Vijay's TVK rules out cabinet berths for AIADMK rebels after VCK, CPM warningsThe development comes amid intense political negotiations in Tamil Nadu following the Assembly election results, with TVK working to consolidate support while balancing pressures from alliance partners.

Abhishek Banerjee owns 43 Kolkata properties? BJP puts out list, TMC calls it fakeThe Bengal BJP has circulated a list of 43 properties allegedly linked to Abhishek Banerjee, prompting a fresh political row. What has drawn particular scrutiny is a jointly owned property linked to Sayani Ghosh. However, TMC MP Saayoni Ghosh has denied any connection to it.

Video: PM Modi and Italian PM Meloni's new viral moment ft. Melody toffeesThe clip quickly went viral online, clocking nearly a million views along with over 56,000 reactions and around 5,000 comments within an hour of being posted. Social media platforms were flooded with memes, screenshots and jokes, with many users calling it the "ultimate #Melodi moment".

K-drama continues: Congress faces Karnataka kasauti after KeralaAfter surviving a bruising leadership tussle in Kerala, the Congress high command now finds itself dragged back into the power struggle in Karnataka. With growing calls for a Cabinet reshuffle by Siddaramaiah's faction, the Karnataka CM tussle between Siddaramaiah and DK Shivakumar is back in the spotlight.
Why is Delhi feeling so hot even at night?These hotter nights mean the air barely cools, leaving residents tossing and turning in stuffy rooms, unable to find rest after bearing an already hot day.

World in flux, Putin and Xi likely to be in New Delhi for Brics SummitIndia is set to host a set of world leaders, including Russian and Chinese Presidents Vladimir Putin and Xi Jinping, in September for the Brics Summit 2026. This comes as the world is torn over two wars with New Delhi walking the tightrope as the Brics President.

Norwegian daily under fire for racist cartoon of PM Modi as snake charmerA Norwegian newspaper sparked outrage after publishing a cartoon depicting Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a snake charmer amid a row over a journalist trying to question him at a press briefing.

Anti-social elements responsible: Railways alleges sabotage behind train firesIndian Railways has said a series of recent train fires were acts of deliberate mischief. Investigations found signs of arson and sabotage at multiple locations.

Salman Khan vs paparazzi outside hospital: Who really crossed the line?Salman Khan clashed with paparazzi outside Mumbai's PD Hinduja Hospital after being followed and pressed for updates on Maatrubhumi. The episode has revived questions about privacy, consent and the eroding limits of celebrity coverage.

Vijay cannot stop Tamil Nadu's blockbuster freebies film. So, what must he do?With his pre-election promise of liberal give-aways—on top of massive existing ones—Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay has shown that the freebie culture is not episodic, it is chronic. Every promise that he made carries a massive recurring price tag that must be paid in hard cash, not cinema tickets. How can he foot the bill?

VD Satheesan scraps Kerala's controversial K-Rail project launched by LDF govtThe VD Satheesan-led Kerala government has scrapped the controversial Thiruvananthapuram-Kasaragod SilverLine rail corridor project, which had faced widespread public opposition during the previous Left government's tenure.

A falling rupee is revealing a bigger crisis of fleeing moneyHandcrafted ByOur Editors The falling rupee needs no support at the moment, and foreign exchange reserves shouldn't be burnt. However, the falling rupee might be pointing to a deeper investment problem. Everything explained here in layman's terms.

No boyfriend? No problem. This Delhi startup will carry your shopping bagsWould you pay someone to carry your heavy shopping bags while you shop till you drop – so you don't have to exhaust your friend, boyfriend, or husband in the process? A Delhi startup lets you do that.

US set up a chessboard with Munir as a pawn years ago. It's playing out nowA chessboard had been laid much earlier. A game had begun even before former Pakistan PM Imran Khan realised it, and Asim Munir took over as the army chief. The US moved the pieces for a regime change in Pakistan. It now has a strategically placed player as the Middle East burns.

Trump says US could strike Iran again within days as Tehran warns of 'new fronts'Donald Trump said the US could strike Iran within days if talks fail, after pausing action to allow diplomacy. Iran warned it would open new fronts in response, as the US and Israel prepared for possible renewed operations.

Why Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 is Malayalam cinema's biggest box office test in 2026Drishyam 3 is more than a sequel for Malayalam cinema. Here are five reasons why Mohanlal's biggest release in years could shape the industry's box office ambitions in 2026.

I won't work for them: The dangerous normalisation of communal politicsStatements that would once have ended political careers are now shrugged off as routine election rhetoric. Open religious mobilisation is no longer whispered from the shadows. It is increasingly performed in broad daylight.

60 days or leave: Indians with H-1B visa struggling to survive after layoffsThousands of Indians on H-1B visas are facing uncertainty after fresh layoffs at major tech firms like Meta and Amazon. With only 60 days to find a new job, many are now struggling to stay in the US amid tighter immigration scrutiny.

The big Modi-Trump meeting may happen as early as next monthPrime Minister Narendra Modi and Donald Trump may come face-to-face at the G7 Summit in France next month. Any pull-aside meeting could be watched closely amid India-US trade tensions.

What is the Suryastra rocket system that India successfully tested?Nibe Limited tested two Suryastra long-range rocket variants at Chandipur for the Indian Army. The accurate strikes point to the growing role of private firms in India's indigenous defence build-up.

The journalist is not the story! A shout is not a question!Norwegian journalist Helle Lyng openly admitted on social media that she never expected PM Modi to answer her shouted query. She knew the protocol. The narrative ceased to be about India's press freedom landscape. It became entirely about her.

Meta layoffs begin, employees wake up to 4 am email, 8,000 jobs on the lineMeta has reportedly begun laying off workers globally, with around 8,000 employees expected to be impacted. As per reports, the company sent emails to affected employees in its Singapore hub at 4 am on Wednesday.

Kishori, what have you done, laal?' Posters slam Congress in AmethiAlleging that Sharma's contribution to the constituency is limited since becoming the MP, the posters read that in the last two years, the Congress leader was only able to provide a school bus run by a local Congress leader and an ambulance to a hospital, which is operated by a trust linked to him.

Video from Tamil Nadu CM Vijay's meeting questions 'reel culture' in governanceA video from Vijay's meeting with disability rights representatives triggered allegations that a government official had filmed and shared it as a reel. Clarifications later said the footage was recorded by social worker Dr P Simmachandran with Vijay's permission.

sports.headline: Riyan Parag hits out at commentators for off-field antics: Talk only about cricket Riyan Parag has urged commentators to stop personal criticism of IPL players, saying athletes are human too, while also praising 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's maturity after his stunning 93.

Bangladesh teammates troll Rizwan with Bollywood jibes BAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Mohammad Rizwan and Litton Das traded sharp words on Day 4 of the Sylhet Test, which Pakistan lost by 73 runs. Bangladesh's stump-mic Bollywood jibes went viral on social media.

Another Banglawash: Pakistan sink to new low despite Rizwan fight in Sylhet Test BAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Bangladesh outclassed Pakistan by 78 runs in Sylhet on Wednesday to complete a 2-0 Test sweep. It is the second successive 0-2 defeat for Pakistan against Bangladesh as they slipped to No. 8 in the World Test Championship cycle.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reveals meaning behind 'A' celebration that's gone viral Vaibhav Sooryavanshi revealed the secret behind his new 'A' celebration which he brought out after his half-century against the Lucknow Super Giants in Jaipur.

KKR vs MI: Playoff hopes on the line for Kolkata as Mumbai look to crash party KKR vs MI Preview: Three-time champions Kolkata Knight Riders find themselves in a do-or-die situation as they take on an already-eliminated Mumbai Indians at Eden Gardens on Wednesday, with their IPL 2026 playoff hopes hanging in the balance.

Can I get a photo? Australia great turns Sooryavanshi fanboy after Jaipur storm IPL 2026: After Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's 93 in Jaipur, Lucknow Super Giants coach Justin Langer interrupted a shoot to ask him for a photo. It showed how the Rajasthan Royals prodigy is leaving elite bowlers and veterans mesmerised.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi not buying into the hype, its just the start of a long journey RR vs LSG: Following a spectacular 38-ball 93 that dismantled LSG, 15-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi remains incredibly grounded, brushing off the sudden media frenzy to focus purely on the long cricket journey that lies ahead of him.

Ravindra Jadeja 2.0? Harsh Dubey could be India's next all-format weapon India have called up Vidarbha all-rounder Harsh Dubey for the one-off Test and ODI series against Afghanistan. The move puts the record-breaking domestic performer in the frame as a long-term successor to Ravindra Jadeja.

India's squad vs Afghanistan: Decoding big snubs, what it means for the future The squad announcement for the Afghanistan series marks the official blueprint for India's future. While senior pillars remain, the selectors have actively initiated a transition phase, blooding a younger core ahead of the 2027 World Cup cycle.

Arsenal crowned Premier League champions: The 22-year wait is finally over Arsenal are Premier League champions, ending a 22-year drought. Mikel Arteta's side clinched the title after Manchester City's 1-1 draw at Bournemouth, sparking wild celebrations ahead of Sunday's coronation clash at Crystal Palace.

Play of the Day: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi 2.0 stuns LSG with controlled aggressionIPL 2026, RR vs LSG: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scored 93 runs off 38 balls against the Lucknow Super Giants on Tuesday in Jaipur, but during his innings, he also displayed maturity and patience, revealing another side to his game.

Rishabh Pant drops the F-bomb on live TV: LSG are a f***g good teamIPL 2026: Rishabh Pant backed Lucknow Super Giants after their loss to Rajasthan Royals and used an expletive on live television. The remark came as Lucknow slipped to the bottom of the table and Pant faced mounting pressure.

IPL playoff scenario: Rajasthan Royals keep fate in own hands for 4th spotIPL 2026, RR vs LSG: Rajasthan Royals have made life difficult for the other teams in playoff contention after defeating Lucknow Super Giants by seven wickets on Tuesday, May 19 at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur.

RR ride the Vaibhav Sooryavanshi storm to crush LSG and tighten playoff gripIPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals chased 221 against Lucknow Super Giants on the back of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's 93 and Dhruv Jurel's unbeaten 53. The win kept RR in the playoff race, lifted them above Punjab Kings and left Mitchell Marsh's 96 in vain.

Chris Gayle, watch out: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi first Indian with 50 sixes in IPL seasonIPL 2026, RR vs LSG: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the first Indian to hit 50 sixes in an Indian Premier League season and is closing in on Chris Gayle's long-standing record for most sixes in a single edition.

Where's your chit now? Sunil Gavaskar mocks LSG's Aakash Singh on live TVIPL 2026: Sunil Gavaskar criticised Lucknow Super Giants pacer Aakash Singh during the IPL 2026 clash against Rajasthan Royals after the youngster conceded heavily while defending 220 in Jaipur. Gavaskar questioned Singh's on-field celebrations as teenage batter Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powered RR's chase with a stunning 38-ball 93.

Karman Kaur Thandi crashes out of French Open in horror Grand Slam comebackFrench Open 2026: Karman Kaur Thandi endured a difficult outing on Tuesday as Harmony Tan needed just 57 minutes to secure a dominant 6-1, 6-0 win in the opening round of the qualifiers.

Mohammad Rizwan Pakistan's last hope as Bangladesh near Test series sweepBAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Mohammad Rizwan remained unbeaten on 75 as Pakistan are looking to chase 437 in the Sylhet Test, still needing 121 runs for victory, with Bangladesh firmly in control and strong favourites to win the match.

Struggling Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of Wimbledon after missing French OpenWorld No. 2 Carlos Alcaraz confirmed that he will miss the upcoming Wimbledon Championships, scheduled to begin in June, as he continues his recovery from a wrist injury. The Spaniard announced his withdrawal from this year's tournament due to the lingering issue.

Virat Kohli urges next generation to chase greatness beyond instant IPL fameStar Indian batter Virat Kohli urged young cricketers not to get carried away by the instant fame and financial rewards of the IPL, saying the real challenge lies in staying committed to the sport for a long period and earning respect across the cricketing world.

Are IPL teams forcing injured stars to play? BCCI secretary breaks silenceIPL 2026: BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia said franchises make the final call on injured players during the IPL. His remarks followed scrutiny over KKR playing Varun Chakravarthy despite a hairline fracture.

England Women's T20 World Cup scare: Sciver-Brunt ruled out of warm-up seriesNat Sciver-Brunt will miss England's T20 series against New Zealand and India after a calf tear. The injury disrupts a crucial World Cup build-up and forces further changes to England's squad.

Never back down: PV Sindhu reveals priceless advice from Virat Kohli on special meetIndia's badminton star PV Sindhu revealed the inspiring advice she received from Virat Kohli during their recent meeting in Bengaluru, praising the RCB star for constantly guiding and motivating fellow athletes.

Big blow for RR as injured Riyan Parag misses LSG clashIPL 2026: Riyan Parag missed Rajasthan Royals' clash against Lucknow Super Giants with a hamstring injury. His absence, along with Ravindra Jadeja's continued recovery, has added to RR's playoff worries.

Why Rishabh Pant was removed as India's Test vice-captainAjit Agarkar said Rishabh Pant remains central to India's Test plans despite losing the vice-captaincy and his ODI place. The selectors have split his role for now, with KL Rahul elevated and other wicketkeeping options preferred in one-day cricket.

Virat Kohli reveals impostor syndrome, says Rahul Dravid took care of him mentallyFormer India captain Virat Kohli has opened up about battling "impostor syndrome" during his career, revealing that former head coach Rahul Dravid and batting coach Vikram Rathour played a major role in helping him rediscover the joy of playing cricket after stepping down from captaincy.

Cristiano Ronaldo set for record sixth FIFA World Cup as Portugal announce squadCristiano Ronaldo has been picked in Portugal's 27-man squad for what would be his sixth World Cup. The call keeps his chase for a first world title alive and adds an emotional Diogo Jota tribute.

RR vs LSG Highlight: Sooryavanshi-led RR tighten play-off grip with 221 chaseRR (Rajasthan) vs LSG (Lucknow) HighlightScore, IPL 2026: RR (225/3 in 19.1 ovs) chasing 221. A Vaibhav Sooryavanshi storm in Jaipur ensured Rajasthan Royals remained in firm contention of the final play-off birth.

Total shame: Auqib Nabi omission from Afghanistan Test leaves fans furiousIND vs AFG: Auqib Nabi's omission from India's Afghanistan Test squad sparked outrage among fans despite the Jammu and Kashmir pacer enjoying a sensational domestic season.

Days after getting Virat Kohli on a duck, Prince Yadav earns maiden ODI call-upPrince Yadav has earned a first India ODI call-up after a strong domestic and IPL run. This comes amid Virat Kohli's praise of the young pacer and India's rotation call underlining a shift towards testing new pace depth.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
